metadata.description: AI Workflow Architecture: context engineering knowledge base combined with a standardized, quality-gated multi-agent development pipeline. Includes the Cross-Skill Porter for Claude Code → Gemini CLI migration.

plugins.name: workflow-execution-layer
plugins.description: The operational backbone: L0-L3 agent hierarchy with pipeline orchestrator, story management, quality gatekeeper, and implementation workers. Implements the Universal Agent Workflow with Non-Commit Policy.

plugins.name: cross-platform-migration
plugins.description: Cross-platform skill portation tools. The cross-skill-porter automates Claude Code → Gemini CLI conversion with a non-destructive 5-phase pipeline (detection, extraction, permission inversion, path translation, validation). Universal agent workflow defines the binding standard for all skills.

plugins.name: context-engineering-fundamentals
plugins.description: Core context engineering knowledge: context window anatomy, degradation patterns, compression strategies, and optimization techniques. Reference material consulted by executing agents during pipeline operations.

plugins.name: agent-architecture
plugins.description: Multi-agent patterns, memory systems, tool design, filesystem-based context, and hosted agent infrastructure for building production AI agent architectures

plugins.name: agent-evaluation
plugins.description: Evaluation frameworks including LLM-as-judge, multi-dimensional rubrics, pairwise comparison, and bias mitigation techniques. Applied by task-reviewer during quality gate validations.

plugins.name: agent-development-methodology
plugins.description: Project development methodology: task-model fit analysis, staged pipeline architecture, structured output design. Guides pipeline-orchestrator during project bootstrapping.

plugins.name: cognitive-architecture
plugins.description: BDI mental state modeling and cognitive architecture patterns for building rational agents with formal belief-desire-intention representations
